HOME | CAREERS | ABOUT | LOGIN

Software Engineer - Atreus Corp

Location: Remote | Salary: $150k - $200k

We are looking for a Software Engineer to build the future of AI. You must have experience with:
- React and Next.js
- Node.js and TypeScript
- LaTeX and PDF generation
- Browser Extension development

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement new features
- Write clean, maintainable code
- Collaborate with other engineers

Benefits:
- Unlimited PTO
- Health insurance
- 401(k) matching
